title: Fix You
why_this_song: Fix You by Coldplay (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I will try to fix you
When you lose something you cannot replace
Tears stream down your face, and I...

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tears" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tears" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "face" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "face" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And high up above, or down below
When you lose something you cannot replace

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And the tears come streaming down your face
Tears stream down your face, and I...

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Fix You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Fix You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Fix You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Fix You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Coldplay one question about "Fix You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Coldplay sobre "Fix You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Fix You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Fix You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
